description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 (third submission following second CLOUD_CODE re-execution). CLOUD_CODE completed second re-validation (commit bc30f68e579928219a9b57c4f295f6113430eb39) confirming all five autonomous loop integrity checks passing: (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter active (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5); (2) server-side current_task.json update step gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED present (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); (4) governance/ledger/ contains valid ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162 and correct commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json updated with current timestamp and pass status. ANALYST asserts autonomous loop integrity criteria are fully satisfied across two independent CLOUD_CODE execution passes. AUDITOR must issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED or VERIFICATION_FAILED based on independent inspection of governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and referenced workflow files on main branch. Upon VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED, TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 is CLOSED and system advances to the next roadmap phase.
